positive: Minimalist vector graphic illustration of a stylized mountain range silhouette at sunset, designed for apparel print. The mountains should be represented by clean, overlapping geometric shapes in deep indigo and burnt orange. Incorporate a simplified crescent moon and small clusters of stylized pine trees. The overall composition must be highly balanced and centered, utilizing negative space effectively. The style should be modern, flat design, with thick, uniform outlines suitable for screen printing. The lighting should suggest a dramatic, high-contrast glow emanating from behind the peaks, emphasizing the sharp edges of the shapes. High saturation, vibrant, and perfectly scalable.
